TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_mb‚Äôala, title = mb‚Äôala, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/mb‚Äôala} }

S.FORM: alang mb'ala ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 142 buwan, 449 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 385 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 64 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Setik 5%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga nakahara. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang mb'ala ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 142 buwan, 449 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 385 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 64 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Setik 5%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga nakahara. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mő≤ Ēala …£a nija mki s~…ēku nanto keŇč atu nin Ēaj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, s~…ēetik *%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, ¶~ ®ou *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mő≤ Ēala ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mő≤ Ēala ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mő≤ Ēala ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na mő≤ Ēala ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na mő≤ Ēala ńßja Ē …£a nakańßara. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
